subject: Geography
title: The Pyrenees Wall
description: A quick, practical guide to The Pyrenees Wall.

hook.text: The Pyrenees form a nearly perfect wall between France and Spain for 430 km.

buildup.text: Unlike the Alps, few easy passes cross them. They isolated Spain for centuries.

discovery.text: Andorra, a tiny nation, has survived in the Pyrenees since the year 1278.

twist.text: During WWII, thousands of refugees fled Nazi-occupied France through hidden mountain paths.

climax.text: The range helped Spain and France develop very different cultures despite being neighbors.

punchline.text: One mountain wall made two nations strangers.

quiz.question: What tiny nation has survived in the Pyrenees since 1278?
